audits.reason: The sensory work lands first, then the beat cashes out into an abstract verdict word. In a stone-wall scene, the close should stay with what lets Sylvanas locate Jaina rather than stepping up into thesis.
audits.suggestedFix: Bread. Ash. Enough to find her through stone.

audits.reason: This is a conceptual label about the interrogation rather than an observed tell. The scene already has the clerk's board, question order, and pen-hand to prove prearrangement without pausing for summary.
audits.suggestedFix: He never looked down to find the next question. The order was already there.

audits.reason: After the dry tick and the chest finding a seam, the one-word confirmation flattens the moment into a verdict stamp. The prose should stay in Sylvanas's body and the stone under her hand.
audits.suggestedFix: Her fingers dug harder into the flagstone seam.

audits.excerpt:
The chains were lighter here than dungeon irons.

That was part of the room too.

Not dungeon iron but courtroom iron: light enough to walk in, loose enough for every bench in the hall to read prisoner before person.
audits.reason: The middle line steps out of the material and explains the symbolism before the next sentence has already carried it. That extra bridge weakens the clean courtroom-read the paragraph otherwise earns.
audits.suggestedFix:
The chains were lighter here than dungeon irons.

Not dungeon iron but courtroom iron: light enough to walk in, loose enough for every bench in the hall to read prisoner before person.

audits.excerpt: Whether Ashcombe meant to or merely understood that fear did useful work, the difference was academic.
audits.reason: The line turns a live room problem into essay logic just when the chest, silver paste, and guard reactions are carrying the pressure physically. It should stay with the visible cost of leaving the lid open.
audits.suggestedFix: Either way, the chest stayed open while the silver paste blackened further around the lid corners.

audits.excerpt: For a few breaths the hall remembered what witness was meant to do.
audits.reason: This is courtroom thesis rather than courtroom business. Uther's beat has enough force already in Thornton looking up, the held silence, and the room's stillness around the rail.
audits.suggestedFix: For a few breaths even Thornton looked up from the papers and no pen scratched below the bench.

audits.excerpt: He had come in person. That made the empty witness chair worse, not better.
audits.reason: The second sentence summarizes the emotional effect instead of making the absence visible on the page. A stronger version keeps Antonidas's body and the still-unused chair in the same frame.
audits.suggestedFix: He had come in person. The witness chair beside the rail still sat empty.

audits.excerpt:
Family should never have been brought here.

The Convocation had made certain it was.
audits.reason: The moment leaves Vereesa's body, the seal, and the room full of strangers for an institutional summary. This cut should stay with the material humiliations that make the family wound visible.
audits.suggestedFix: The gold seal cracked in her sister's hands while strangers watched from the benches.
